findings.description: Pinned package name 'djano' (ecosystem=pypi) is Levenshtein distance 1 from canonical popular package 'django'. Typosquatting risk per Radaro AI-Assisted Development Policy v1.3 §8.2.
findings.fix: Verify 'djano' is the package you actually intended to install. If it should be 'django', remove 'djano' and pin 'django' instead.
findings.title: Lockfile pins 'djano' looks like typosquat of 'django'
